flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Terra State Community College fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (25.5% → 19.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Terra State Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Terra State Community College rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 (46.0% → 54.8%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Terra State Community College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $8.5k).
